name: github
description: GitHub repository operations — branches, commits, PRs, checks. Used during implement (push branch) and deploy (open PR).

tools.name: github_get_repo
tools.description: Fetch repo metadata (default branch, visibility, permissions).

tools.name: github_list_branches
tools.description: List branches matching a pattern. Used to find existing work for a ticket.

tools.name: github_create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch from a base. Naming: 'feat/PROJ-401-short-description' or 'fix/PROJ-401-...'.

tools.name: github_push_files
tools.description: Push one or more file changes to a branch in a single commit.

tools.name: github_open_pr
tools.description: Open a pull request. Title follows conventional commit format. Body includes the validator report link.

tools.name: github_get_pr
tools.description: Fetch PR details including CI status, review state, and mergeable flag.

tools.name: github_request_review
tools.description: Request a review from a user or team. Deployer uses this after opening the PR.

tools.name: github_merge_pr
tools.description: Merge a PR. The deployer is BLOCKED from calling this by the hook layer — only the user can merge.

envVars.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
envVars.description: Personal access token or fine-grained token with 'contents:write', 'pull_requests:write', 'metadata:read' scopes.

envVars.name: GITHUB_DEFAULT_REPO
envVars.description: owner/repo, e.g. 'acme/api'. If unset, the tool infers from the local git remote.
